summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KotlerX Multi-Modal Login and Lead Management features. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed) and frontend UI flows working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: NFC login with valid card (NFC_TESTLOGIN)
Backend: NFC login invalid card rejection
Backend: OTP verify with mock OTP (123456)
Frontend: Login page with 3 tabs (Email, NFC, Mobile)
Frontend: Email login redirects to Admin Panel
Frontend: NFC login with NFC_TESTLOGIN successful
Frontend: Mobile+OTP login flow (OTP sent, verified with 123456)
Frontend: Admin Panel Leads tab with statistics
Frontend: Export to Excel button downloads .xlsx file
Frontend: Lead creation from Programs page
Frontend: Lead registration dialog with form validation
seed_data_creation: Created NFC test student with NFC_TESTLOGIN card ID and mobile 9876543210
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-modal login (Email, NFC, Mobile+OTP) and Lead Management features are fully functional. Test student with NFC_TESTLOGIN exists. Mock OTP is 123456. Admin panel leads tab shows statistics and allows status updates and Excel export.

admin_leads_tab.statistics: Working - shows Total, New, Contacted, Converted counts
admin_leads_tab.leads_table: Working - displays Name, Location, Mobile, Program Interest, Fee Type, Status, Date

lead_creation.programs_page: Working - Register Interest dialog with form validation
